first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the reasoning is substantively the same across both evaluations. Both versions correctly identify the candidate's strengths in general software engineering and staff-level experience, while also pointing out the exact same critical gaps in required AI/ML skills (Python, RAG, vector databases) and years of experience. The minor differences in wording are consistent with normal run-to-run variation and do not reflect any bias related to the change in the candidate's name.
